overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of walking along a narrow forest trail at night. The player moves steadily from a path alongside a large rock wall into a more open wooded area, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail alongside rock cliff

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path with a flashlight illuminating the ground ahead

entered.detail: tall textured rock face forming a continuous wall along the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail covered with dry leaves and small debris
tall green grass and leafy undergrowth lining the left side of the trail
dense dark forest trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a narrow dirt trail at night, hugging a large rock wall on the right. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing tall grass on the left and the textured cliff face on the right. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated with dense vegetation surrounding the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail transitioning from rock wall to tree line

events.description: large rock wall on right side ends and is replaced by trees and dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain transitions from cliffside to forest

entered.detail: slender trees and bushes replacing the rock wall on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the imposing rock wall on the right gradually ends and is replaced by scattered trees and undergrowth. The trail widens slightly into a more open forest path. The lighting remains dim with the flashlight beam revealing the changing terrain from rock face to vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with vegetation on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest along the winding dirt path

entered.detail: large boulder or rock outcropping visible ahead on the path in the distance

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a more open forest area with trees and dense undergrowth on both sides. The rock wall is now completely behind, and the path ahead reveals a distant rock formation or boulder blocking part of the trail. The flashlight continues to illuminate the dirt path as the camera moves steadily forward through the dark woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow night trail that transitions from a confined cliffside path into an open woodland. It begins with the camera hugging a large, textured rock wall on the right while a flashlight illuminates the dirt path and tall grass on the left. As the camera moves forward, the imposing rock face gradually recedes, giving way to scattered trees and dense undergrowth as the trail widens. The scene then opens further into a dark forest area with vegetation on both sides, leaving the cliff wall entirely behind. Finally, the flashlight beam reveals a distant boulder blocking part of the path ahead as the camera continues its steady advance through the isolated woods.
